HEADING: Refine the agent
SUBHEADING: You rejected the action below. Use this moment to improve the agent's instructions so it doesn't make the same kind of mistake again.
FLASH_REJECTED: Rejected. You can refine the agent's prompt below to prevent similar misfires.
CHOICE_AUTO_DESC: Describe what went wrong. A model proposes a revised prompt for you to review.
CHOICE_MANUAL_DESC: Open the full agent editor and rewrite the prompt yourself.
SKIP_LINK: Skip and return to the approval
FEEDBACK_LABEL: What should the agent have done differently?
FEEDBACK_PLACEHOLDER: E.g. "The comment was sarcastic but not spam — the agent should treat tone like this as allowed unless it targets a user."
NO_CHANGE_MESSAGE: The model did not propose any changes. Try describing what was wrong more specifically.
ERROR_GENERIC: Something went wrong while contacting the refiner model. Please try again.
ERROR_RATE_LIMITED: Too many refine requests in the last minute. Please wait and try again.
ERROR_EMPTY_FEEDBACK: Please describe what was wrong so the model has something to go on.
APPLY_ERROR_EMPTY: The refined prompt was empty. Please try again.
APPLY_ERROR_TOO_LONG: The refined prompt was too long to save. Please shorten it and try again.
